name: Adam
oracleText:
When Adam, First of Dust enters the battlefield, create a Food token.
As long as you control an artifact or enchantment, Adam gets +1/+1.
Whenever you sacrifice a Food, put a +1/+1 counter on Adam.
flavorText: "And whatsoever Adam called every living creature, that was the name thereof." — Genesis 2:19
notes: Early World major figure card based on the first three entries in the card list batch. Local reference image downloaded from the National Gallery of Art public-domain open-access download for Albrecht Durer's Adam and Eve.
title: First of Dust
